name: spiderbots
title: Spiderbots
description:
Adds loyal prototype spidertrons that follow you around. They can build, deconstruct, and upgrade blueprints using your inventory.
Spiderbots are a basic alternative to early construction mods such as Nanobots and Companion Drones.
Deploy / Recall: Alt + S
author: asher_sky

scripts.prepackage: if grep -q 'require("tests/runtime")' control.lua; then echo 'Remove require("tests/runtime") before packaging' >&2; exit 1; fi
